description: Long-session memory stress test (30-turn sessions). Core facts are stated in turns 1-5 and are OUTSIDE the 12-turn baseline window when checks fire at turns 25-30. Short-range facts at turns 21-23 are inside the window. Expected: memory ~83%, baseline ~33%.
